attacking_style: Not primarily an attacker; opportunities come from team time trial positioning and tactical team decisions rather than individual offensive moves.
team_tactics: DSM prioritizes him unexpectedly over bigger names (given red jersey over Ganna), suggesting flexible hierarchy based on race situation rather than predetermined leadership.
terrain_preference: Benefits from team time trial formats where collective strength can position him favorably. Appears vulnerable in adverse weather conditions.
vulnerability: Extreme weakness in wet conditions—abandoned race while wearing red jersey at 18km to go, indicating inability to handle rain/standing water.
key_patterns: Gains race lead through team time trial performance rather than individual prowess (2 observations)
Cannot sustain performance in wet/rainy conditions, abandoning even when holding leadership (2 observations)
Team shows willingness to elevate him over established stars like Ganna when situation suits (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: abandoned next day while in red jersey, suggesting he either lacks durability or cannot handle adverse conditions after strong TTT
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 1
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 1
